headline: Taking a look at who could be the Jets' starting QB in 2026
description: New York has plenty of options to revamp its quarterbacks room through free agency, trading and the draft.

headline: 2026 NFL draft QB rankings: Mendoza, Simpson, Nussmeier
description: Who are the best quarterbacks in the 2026 class? We sized up the top 12, starting with Fernando Mendoza and Ty Simpson.

headline: 2026 NFL draft order: 32 first-round picks, Raiders at No. 1
description: The Raiders, Jets and Cardinals hold the top three picks in the 2026 NFL draft. See the rest of the order -- plus each team's top need.

headline: The story behind NFL draft prospect Gennings Dunker's mullet
description: NFL draft prospect Gennings Dunker joins Rich Eisen to tell the story behind his viral mullet.
